programme.desc: The atmosphere is strained between Zoe and Becky. Paddy is shocked when he hears a gunshot at Outhwaite's house. Kathy regrets teaching Sam to read and write

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Mike pays Frances to clear Ashley's name. Roy decides to change the name of the cafe to Roy's Rolls. Samantha grows tired of having Sean around all the time

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Fiona is proud of Alan's promotion. Sean tries to apologise to Samantha. Ashley is shocked when the police arrest him on suspicion of arson

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: A student production of The Merchant of Venice is halted when the actor playing Shylock is murdered during the performance. Lewis and Hathaway are struck by the lack of grief among the cast and crew - especially the ambitious director, who wastes no time recasting the role. The detectives discover the victim had an expensive lifestyle and not only owed money to his fellow students, but was also suspected of stealing from them. However, the investigation has barely got under way before the killer strikes again. Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox star

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Millionaire Gordon Cloade's wife is widowed for the second time at the tender age of 23, arousing the suspicions of his impoverished relatives. Fanning the flames of envy and hatred, psychic aunt Kathy Cloade reveals the grieving widow's first husband is in fact still alive, and a second death prompts Poirot to delve deeper into the family's dark secrets. David Suchet stars, with Jenny Agutter, Tim Piggot-Smith and Celia Imrie

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: An aristocrat's wealthy, overbearing wife finances a North African archaeological dig to find the skull of John the Baptist. Poirot is in attendance, but when the woman is found stabbed to death, and only her husband, the exuberant Lord Boynton, appears distraught, the detective struggles to identify the killer among the wealth of suspects. Guest starring Tim Curry, Cheryl Campbell, John Hannah, Emma Cunniffe, Mark Gatiss, Angela Pleasence and Beth Goddard, with David Suchet in the title role

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Des spends the night on the Websters' sofa, to teach Steph a lesson. Mike worries about what Ivy will say to the workers, and Jackie tells him she is not going to share him. First shown on December 10, 1990

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Mike and Jackie row about how to run Ingram's, Des tells Steph he wants children, and Don tells Ivy he is scared that Marie will turn to prostitution. First shown on December 12, 1990

programme.title: The Trouble with Maggie Cole
programme.desc: Peter Cole is worried about the press interest following Maggie's interview and the online petition calling for his resignation over the scandal. Meanwhile, Alex is greeted at work by two money lenders, who have found him because his girlfriend Roxanna's picture appeared in the papers. Author Marcus Ormansby gives a talk at the school, and finds that romance is blossoming between him and Jill. Later, Maggie's visit to Kelly's salon is tense, but they have a heart to heart, leading Kelly to return home to husband Neil and take action over their 'lottery' money

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Feature-length episode of the crime drama. DI Frost has his hands full coping with death threats, arson and a staff shortage at the station - but anything is better than staying at home with an unwelcome guest. David Jason stars as the grouchy inspector, with Tony Haygarth, Diane Bull, Denise Black and Dominic Jephcott

programme.title: Heartbeat

Tricia Penrose, Mark Jordon, Jonathan Kerrigan and Gwen Taylor star

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid arranges a fishing weekend, blissfully unaware Jean's father is coming to stay. Classic family comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid returns home from work to be greeted with Sally's shocking news. Family comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: Dervish and Co are back at the crease but with ball tampering and rule bending rife, a fair game seems out of the question. Cricketing comedy drama, starring Brenda Blethyn, Robert Daws, Timothy Spall and Josie Lawrence

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Louisa and Martin have their first therapy session together - though neither of them was expecting they would be given homework - while Morwenna is not happy about it when a teenager on work experience starts trying to boss her around in the surgery. Mrs Tishell is surprised when her husband Clive returns and tells her he wants to give things another go, and Louisa has to call Martin when one of her pupils collapses during a school excursion. Comedy drama, starring Martin Clunes and Caroline Catz

programme.title: The Durrells
programme.desc: With the house guests getting ever more rowdy, Louisa worries about the villa's reputation, but Spiros's increasing presence at the villa continues to delight her. Margo finds a surprising way to bond with Maud, while Gerry realises he has feelings for Galini.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Rosie is viciously attacked while attending a broken-down vehicle stranded on the moors. When the body of the driver is discovered nearby, Rob and Rachel are determined to solve the mystery. Their investigation leads to a chilling discovery linking the case to a religious cult near Aidensfield

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Chris and Kelly organise the drinks party for the American executives. Paddy tries to talk Outhwaite into leaving the farm. An accident leaves Kelly unconscious

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Chris and Zoe wait at the hospital for news about Kelly, and he blames Kim for the accident. Zoe confides in Becky about all the Tate troubles

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Rita is still furious with Kevin. Deirdre is stunned to be asked to become manager of Sunliners. Ashley appears before magistrates and is remanded in custody

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ashley is released by the police. Chris thinks something is going on between Natalie and Kevin. Gail tells Alma that Roy does not want her to work at the cafe

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Religious fanatic Steven Mullan is found beaten and drowned in his bath. Lewis and Hathaway discover he had been imprisoned for trying to kill well-known atheist Tom Rattan and had only recently been released. The inspector soon has reason to believe the Rattan family is hiding something from him - but nothing prepares him for the evidence Dr Hobson uncovers at the post-mortem. Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox star, with guest appearances by Jenny Seagrove and Julian Wadham

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: In Dover, Lieutenant Colin Race is investigating the deaths of two Navy personnel when a distraught Sheila Webb runs out of 19 Wilbraham Crescent and into his arms. Inside the house, Colin finds the body of a murder victim surrounded by stopped clocks. Mystery, starring David Suchet, Anna Massey, Jaime Winstone, Lesley Sharp, Phil Daniels, Geoffrey Palmer and Tessa Peake-Jones

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth is reunited with old friend Ariadne Oliver, who has been commissioned to stage a game of murder hunt at a summer fete in the grounds of Nasse House, the recently purchased home of wealthy financier Sir George Stubbs. However, the novelist's instincts tell her she's getting involved in something much darker - and she's proved right when the girl volunteering to play the part of the victim really does turn out to be dead. Whodunit, starring David Suchet, with Zoe Wanamaker, Sean Pertwee, Martin Jarvis, Sam Kelly, Sinead Cusack, Rosalind Ayres and Tom Ellis

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ken leads the demonstrators to stop the council from digging up the Street's cobble stones, and Audrey has a royal encounter with Prince Charles. First shown on December 8, 2000

programme.title: The Trouble with Maggie Cole
programme.desc: Maggie is horrified that her comments about Roxanna have been interpreted by her Polish father Emil as racist, and she is relieved when they understand what she actually did say. Peter has to contend with a campaign for his resignation, as journalists try to dig up his family skeletons. Meanwhile, money lenders Patrick and Phil put the pressure on Alex to repay his debts, and Marcus and Jill's relationship blossoms when he accompanies her to the planning meeting at the village hall for the village celebrations

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: The detective is paired with DC Webster, an officer who is struggling to fit in with life in Denton after being seconded from Scotland, with the duo investigating a robbery at a local casino and a hit-and-run incident involving Roger Massie, the son of a local politician, and soon finds that both matters are linked. David Jason stars, with Bruce Alexander and George Anton

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid and Jean have a lively debate about the war. Vintage comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Jean spies on Sid when his bad timekeeping makes her suspicious of his activities. Seventies comedy, starring Sid James and Diana Coupland

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: Roger worries about who will make the team's teas when Mim is taken ill. Cricketing comedy drama, starring Brenda Blethyn, Robert Daws, Timothy Spall and Josie Lawrence

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: After reaching breaking point with being followed around by Buddy, Martin resolves to find a vet to have it put down, while Ruth finds out that Bert has been trying to make his own whisky. Clive is suspicious of Mrs Tishell and who she might be cooking meals for, Penhale makes a hash of asking Janice out, and Louisa and Martin's therapy homework results in a picnic on the beach, where they are interrupted by local vet Angela Sim - who appears to be hallucinating. Comedy drama, guest starring Caroline Quentin

programme.title: The Durrells
programme.desc: The residents of Corfu are excited at the prospect of an imminent official visit from the king of Greece, and the Durrells are keen to get themselves involved with the welcoming committee. Leslie takes over leadership of a scout troop, but finds the children under his care far more of a challenge than expected. However, his match-making scheme seems to be going far more smoothly, as his mother and Spiros grow closer. Love may also be in the air for Margo as she makes her return home to the island

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Reverend Jacob Thwaite returns home to find his wife has been murdered, but while Rachel is suspicious of his alibi it's a psychic convention in the town that seems to hold the key to the case. Meanwhile, Peggy devises a plan to sell trout to a hotel in Scarborough that lands her and David in trouble with the authorities. Trudie Goodwin guests

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Will threatens Zoe and warns her to keep away from his mum. Kelly wants nothing more to do with Chris. Eric blames Will for the cellar flooding at the wine bar

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Paddy and Mandy have a row about money. Eric is suspicious when he spots Dee meeting up with Will. Zoe is shocked when Becky tells her she is falling in love with her

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maureen thinks life with Bill is too boring. Martin hears that Don has been sent to a psychiatric hospital. Emily is suspicious to hear that Alec is behind the hospital raffle

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Kevin and Natalie agree to stop seeing each other. Mike is frustrated that Don will not stand trial. Alan suggests to Fiona that she should move in with him

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The body of Dr Stephen Black is found on an Oxford tour bus, and the detectives are led to sprawling Crevecoeur Hall, where Hathaway spent much of his childhood. As he investigates, he is drawn to Scarlett Mortmaigne, the glamorous daughter of the estate's owner, but when another corpse is discovered, Hathaway's refusal to believe the family is involved threatens to test his relationship with Lewis to breaking point. Guest starring Nathaniel Parker (The Inspector Lynley Mysteries), Juliet Aubrey (Primeval) and Stella Gonet (Holby City), with Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective finds himself investigating the strange and gruesome murder of an elderly psychiatrist. Elsewhere, Poirot's old friend Ariadne Oliver is being pressed to uncover the truth behind two decade-old deaths. As the pair dig deep for evidence, they soon discover that their separate investigations are linked and join forces to solve the overarching mystery. David Suchet, Zoe Wanamaker and Greta Scacchi star

programme.title: Griff's Great Britain
programme.desc: Griff Rhys Jones explores the pleasures and perils of Dartmoor National Park - the largest and wildest area of open country in the south of England. He discovers it is home to ancient woodlands, high granite tors and vast tracts of rolling moorland, as well as churches, cream teas, llamas and legends

programme.title: The Road to Coronation Street
programme.desc: Jane Horrocks and Jessie Wallace star in a one-off drama telling the story of how the long-running soap was born. Tony Warren joins producer Harry Elton and director Derek Bennett as they struggle to create the programme, faced with opposition from ITV's formidable bosses Sidney and Cecil Bernstein, while Margaret Morris begins the hunt for the show's cast. With David Dawson, Stephen Berkoff, Celia Imrie and Lynda Baron

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: In the wake of the tram crash, a dying man makes a final wish, Sally risks her life to save a friend, and Gary relives his Afghanistan nightmare. The 50th anniversary episode from December 9, 2010

programme.title: The Trouble with Maggie Cole
programme.desc: Maggie is in need of some time alone so she heads to the pub to see if she can get a room for the night, where she learns the real story of landlord Brian. When she finds out there are no rooms free for her to stay, Maggie decides to go and stay with daughter-in-law Becka, and the pair have a rare moment of bonding. Meanwhile, Peter is working late at the school when his secretary Karen reveals her feelings towards him in a very unexpected way. Later, Alex desperately tries to find the 'lottery' winnings' to pay off the lenders

programme.title: The Trouble with Maggie Cole
programme.desc: As the drama concludes, Roxanna is terrified by Alex's behaviour the previous night, and tries desperately to get to Alex before he confronts the money lenders. Meanwhile, Jill is still feeling shaken after witnessing Peter and Karen kissing and wonders if she should tell Maggie what has happened. As everyone gathers for the village celebrations, a sudden shocking series of events are put in motion that could potentially cost the life of one beloved villager. Starring Dawn French, Mark Heap and Gwyneth Keyworth

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid wants a lie-in, but it is doomed from the beginning as Sally chases romance and Jean goes on a diet. Vintage comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid resolves to exercise a little discipline when Sally adopts a stray dog. Comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Alma looks into emigrating to Florida. Ashley tells Fred about the keys and how Don wants him to ditch them. Rita is stunned to hear that Alec has been claiming Joyce's salary

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ashley fears he will be sent to prison. Kevin is annoyed when Natalie does not answer his phone calls. Tricia decides to give Ray a chance

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Viv and Vic are invited to a dinner party at Home Farm by Chris. Sam and Butch attempt to gatecrash Mandy's underwear party. Will kisses Dee and asks her to leave Eric

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Lord Ashfordly's tenants are angered when his new estate manager Jimbo Brady employs the hard-line methods learned in South Africa and raises their rents. Brian Rogers faces eviction, but suspicion is more widespread when Jimbo's vehicle is sabotaged. Meanwhile, Peggy believes she has found the explanation for David's recent behaviour

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: The family return from holiday, and it seems as if they never went away. Seventies comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: The age gap between Sid and his children becomes apparent when he returns home early from work. Comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: As Brent Park looks ahead to a new season, Roger tries to make amends with Miriam before whipping the team into shape. Cricketing comedy drama, starring Brenda Blethyn

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: The irascible medic decides to move out of the surgery to give Louisa space, leaving Mrs Tishell concerned he will not be able to look after himself on his own. Elsewhere, PC Penhale helps Janice babysit, and Al is very concerned when he finds out about Bert's behaviour and hears there are bailiffs at the restaurant

programme.title: The Durrells
programme.desc: Louisa meets Spiros' wife for the first time, and invites her to join the family on a trip to visit Larry in Kalami. However, the journey ends badly when their picnic is eaten by hungry animals, and Larry turns out to have left the island for Paris. As tensions rise, they seek the help of a local bar owner, who has a special gift for Gerry. Meanwhile, Margo brings a touch of the continent to Prue and Geoffrey's Dorset home

programme.desc: Gina and Phil make the final preparations for their big day, but the groom's uneventful stag night stirs up some pre-wedding nerves. programme.desc: Chris and Zoe wait at the hospital for news about Kelly, and he blames Kim for the accident. Zoe confides in Becky about all the Tate troubles

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Rosie is viciously attacked while attending a broken-down vehicle stranded on the moors. When the body of the driver is discovered nearby, Rob and Rachel are determined to solve the mystery. Their investigation leads to a chilling discovery linking the case to a religious cult near Aidensfield

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid and Jean have a lively debate about the war. Vintage comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Jean spies on Sid when his bad timekeeping makes her suspicious of his activities. Seventies comedy, starring Sid James and Diana Coupland

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: Roger worries about who will make the team's teas when Mim is taken ill. Cricketing comedy drama, starring Brenda Blethyn, Robert Daws, Timothy Spall and Josie Lawrence

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: After reaching breaking point with being followed around by Buddy, Martin resolves to find a vet to have it put down, while Ruth finds out that Bert has been trying to make his own whisky. Clive is suspicious of Mrs Tishell and who she might be cooking meals for, Penhale makes a hash of asking Janice out, and Louisa and Martin's therapy homework results in a picnic on the beach, where they are interrupted by local vet Angela Sim - who appears to be hallucinating. Comedy drama, guest starring Caroline Quentin

programme.title: The Durrells
programme.desc: The residents of Corfu are excited at the prospect of an imminent official visit from the king of Greece, and the Durrells are keen to get themselves involved with the welcoming committee. Leslie takes over leadership of a scout troop, but finds the children under his care far more of a challenge than expected. However, his match-making scheme seems to be going far more smoothly, as his mother and Spiros grow closer. Love may also be in the air for Margo as she makes her return home to the island

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Reverend Jacob Thwaite returns home to find his wife has been murdered, but while Rachel is suspicious of his alibi it's a psychic convention in the town that seems to hold the key to the case. Meanwhile, Peggy devises a plan to sell trout to a hotel in Scarborough that lands her and David in trouble with the authorities. Trudie Goodwin guests

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Will threatens Zoe and warns her to keep away from his mum. Kelly wants nothing more to do with Chris. Eric blames Will for the cellar flooding at the wine bar

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Paddy and Mandy have a row about money. Eric is suspicious when he spots Dee meeting up with Will. Zoe is shocked when Becky tells her she is falling in love with her

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maureen thinks life with Bill is too boring. Martin hears that Don has been sent to a psychiatric hospital. Emily is suspicious to hear that Alec is behind the hospital raffle

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Kevin and Natalie agree to stop seeing each other. Mike is frustrated that Don will not stand trial. Alan suggests to Fiona that she should move in with him

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The body of Dr Stephen Black is found on an Oxford tour bus, and the detectives are led to sprawling Crevecoeur Hall, where Hathaway spent much of his childhood. As he investigates, he is drawn to Scarlett Mortmaigne, the glamorous daughter of the estate's owner, but when another corpse is discovered, Hathaway's refusal to believe the family is involved threatens to test his relationship with Lewis to breaking point. Guest starring Nathaniel Parker (The Inspector Lynley Mysteries), Juliet Aubrey (Primeval) and Stella Gonet (Holby City), with Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective finds himself investigating the strange and gruesome murder of an elderly psychiatrist. Elsewhere, Poirot's old friend Ariadne Oliver is being pressed to uncover the truth behind two decade-old deaths. As the pair dig deep for evidence, they soon discover that their separate investigations are linked and join forces to solve the overarching mystery. David Suchet, Zoe Wanamaker and Greta Scacchi star

programme.title: Griff's Great Britain
programme.desc: Griff Rhys Jones explores the pleasures and perils of Dartmoor National Park - the largest and wildest area of open country in the south of England. He discovers it is home to ancient woodlands, high granite tors and vast tracts of rolling moorland, as well as churches, cream teas, llamas and legends

programme.title: The Road to Coronation Street
programme.desc: Jane Horrocks and Jessie Wallace star in a one-off drama telling the story of how the long-running soap was born. Tony Warren joins producer Harry Elton and director Derek Bennett as they struggle to create the programme, faced with opposition from ITV's formidable bosses Sidney and Cecil Bernstein, while Margaret Morris begins the hunt for the show's cast. With David Dawson, Stephen Berkoff, Celia Imrie and Lynda Baron

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: In the wake of the tram crash, a dying man makes a final wish, Sally risks her life to save a friend, and Gary relives his Afghanistan nightmare. The 50th anniversary episode from December 9, 2010

programme.title: The Trouble with Maggie Cole
programme.desc: Maggie is in need of some time alone so she heads to the pub to see if she can get a room for the night, where she learns the real story of landlord Brian. When she finds out there are no rooms free for her to stay, Maggie decides to go and stay with daughter-in-law Becka, and the pair have a rare moment of bonding. Meanwhile, Peter is working late at the school when his secretary Karen reveals her feelings towards him in a very unexpected way. Later, Alex desperately tries to find the 'lottery' winnings' to pay off the lenders

programme.title: The Trouble with Maggie Cole
programme.desc: As the drama concludes, Roxanna is terrified by Alex's behaviour the previous night, and tries desperately to get to Alex before he confronts the money lenders. Meanwhile, Jill is still feeling shaken after witnessing Peter and Karen kissing and wonders if she should tell Maggie what has happened. As everyone gathers for the village celebrations, a sudden shocking series of events are put in motion that could potentially cost the life of one beloved villager. Starring Dawn French, Mark Heap and Gwyneth Keyworth

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid wants a lie-in, but it is doomed from the beginning as Sally chases romance and Jean goes on a diet. Vintage comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid resolves to exercise a little discipline when Sally adopts a stray dog. Comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Only When I Laugh
programme.desc: Figgis dabbles in amateur psychiatry and deduces that Norman is suffering from sexual repression. Comedy, starring James Bolam and Christopher Strauli

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: The Saint is framed for the murder of a young sculptor, and with the help of the victim's girlfriend, Chief Inspector Teal fights to clear his name and uncover the real culprit. Adventure, starring Roger Moore

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Moriarty seeks revenge on Holmes for foiling his plan to sell the Mona Lisa, and the pair ultimately fight their final battle at the Reichenbach Falls in Switzerland. Jeremy Brett stars as the titular hero, with David Burke making his final appearance as Dr Watson and Eric Porter as Moriarty

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: The duo learn the origin of an old feud, and investigate a protection racket run by a vicious gang boss. Drama, starring Michael Brandon and Glynis Barber

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur does a profitable deal on a fireplace and Terry has to mind a dodgy bookie, putting a damper on his blossoming romance with latest girlfriend Dolly. Vintage comedy drama, starring George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle begin an investigation into why a city's crime rate is steadily falling. They later find themselves victimised by local officers after being charged with a minor traffic offence. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan and Carter track down those responsible for killing a driver and injuring a policeman while making off with vehicles carrying brandy on two separate occasions. Carter's new girlfriend, rookie cop Julie Kingdom, pursues a known fence and recovers the brandy. However, when Regan wants to take the credit, he and Carter come to blows. John Thaw and Dennis Waterman star

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar joins forces with a glamorous female agent in order to help liberate John Spring, a double agent whom the Russians believe to be working for them. Roger Moore stars

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The great detective reveals to a startled Watson how he defeated Moriarty and cheated death beneath the waters of the Reichenbach Falls. Period drama, marking Edward Hardwicke's debut as Holmes' indefatigable chronicler

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: The detective duo probe the connections between a murdered antiques dealer and an Arab embassy official with diplomatic immunity. Police drama, starring Michael Brandon and Glynis Barber

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur spots a potential darts champion and enters him in a contest, where he duly gets nobbled. Undeterred, the dodgy dealer comes up with the idea of staging his own darts tournament. However, fewer players than expected enter, and Arthur is left scrambling to raise the prize money. Comedy drama, starring George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle have reason to suspect their former mentor has turned 'rogue' for money after two key suspects in a drug-smuggling case are delivered to their killers. Action drama, with Lewis Collins, Martin Shaw and Glyn Owen

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A member of a group of convicts slips off the roof and dies during a robbery. The apparent leader of the gang appears to be having doubts about his life and Regan senses he is deliberately pointing clues in a desire to be caught during his next job. John Thaw and Dennis Waterman star

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Warwick Davis hosts the quiz, in which a team of five old school friends calling themselves the Playground Pals answer questions about top 10 lists then try to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money

programme.title: World Rally Championship Highlights
programme.desc: Drivers head to Italy for the ACI Rally Monza stage, with race track sections mixed with banked curves, service roads and mountain roads in the foothills of the Italian Alps

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: Henry Cole rides an African Twin through the backroads of Oxfordshire, road-tests his first ever electric motorbike, and reveals Alan Milyard's extraordinary new Kawasaki

programme.title: Hot Fuzz (2007)
programme.desc: An overly zealous, by-the-book London policeman is reassigned to a sleepy country village where the crime rate is virtually zero, and teamed up with an eager but dimwitted partner. But just as the officer's uneventful new environment begins to chafe, a grisly series of so-called accidents gives him reason to suspect a strange conspiracy is afoot. Action comedy, with Simon Pegg, Nick Frost, Jim Broadbent, Timothy Dalton and Paddy Considine

programme.desc: A woman is tormented by calls from her supposedly deceased husband, whose lifeless body was pulled from the sea several weeks earlier. While she is admitted to a sanatorium to prevent a nervous breakdown, Templar works on the premise that her spouse may indeed still be alive. Roger Moore and Sylvia Syms star

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The youthful heir to a fortune disappears from boarding school in the dead of night - but his aristocratic father's aversion to publicity makes the case particularly difficult to investigate. Period drama, starring Jeremy Brett

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: A top model is murdered by a hit-and-run driver. Dempsey and Makepeace discover she had connections at the highest level in government circles. When the two detectives make further investigations they uncover some disturbing facts.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Terry's girlfriend Debbie starts work as a mobile hairdresser. Unfortunately the first house she attends is robbed, and she and Terry become suspects. When Arthur becomes involved, the police take over his lock-up. Vintage comedy drama, starring Dennis Waterman and George Cole

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: As whole estates of houses begin to crumble, CI5 uncovers corruption surrounding the awarding of contracts to build homes. Maurice Denham and Bill Fraser guest star alongside Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A bad dream has Regan's girlfriend fearing for his safety, and her visions ring true when he gets involved in a case involving a stolen lorryload of cigars. The plot thickens when illicit cocaine is retrieved and arms stolen from the US are discovered to be on their way to a military faction in Ireland. John Thaw and Dennis Waterman star

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Warwick Davis hosts the quiz, in which a team of five mobile fish and chip shop workers answers questions about top 10 lists then tries to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money

programme.title: On the Road
programme.desc: In this episode we drive two incredibly rare Zagatos, go skiing with an all-new Rolls-Royce, make a special delivery from Monte Carlo to London, explore the Dolomites in a rather unusual three-wheeler, head to Scotland in an open-top Ferrari, and take a trip to the great British seaside

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: Henry brings his Chopper rebuild to a glorious climax while taking time to ride the latest CCM bike, tell the story of the Honda Fireblade and ride out on vintage Norton ES2

programme.title: Die Another Day (2002)
programme.desc: James Bond is suspended from duty after being taken hostage in North Korea, but goes against orders to track down those who betrayed him. During the pursuit of the terrorist he was investigating before his capture, he discovers a connection with a British billionaire who has constructed a devastating orbital weapon. Spy adventure, starring Pierce Brosnan, Halle Berry, Toby Stephens, Judi Dench and John Cleese

programme.title: ITV Racing Live
programme.desc: Francesca Cumani and Ed Chamberlin present day one of the December Meeting from Cheltenham, with four races at the home of National Hunt Racing. Today's feature race is the 3.00 Cross Country Chase, the second race of the season over the unique test and November's renewal was won by Kingswell Theatre. There's also action from Bangor, with a competitive handicap hurdle on the card. Analysis from Mick Fitzgerald and Luke Harvey, with reports from Oli Bell, Alice Plunkett and Matt Chapman

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Terry is pleased when villainous old friend Jack ''Oily' Wragg returns to England, However, his pleasure melts away when he learns that there are old scores to settle and that Wragg intends to stage one final heist. Light-hearted crime drama, guest starring Pete Postlethwaite, with George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: The team assists the Russian authorities in tracking down a former spy, whose defection threatens international security. Cowley is anxious to locate him first amid fears others may prefer to silence him permanently. Drama, starring Gordon Jackson, Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: The Contessa is used as bait in a trap to lure an assassin out into the open. Drama, starring Robert Vaughn, Nyree Dawn Porter and Tony Anholt

programme.desc: We're in Italy to drive a race car for the road, and in Bristol with a pair of hot-hatches. We try launch control in an electric rocketship, drive Ferrari's latest racegrade weaponry and take to the track in three everyday sports coupes

programme.title: The A-Team (2010)
programme.desc: Four soldiers are sent on a top-secret mission in Iraq that results in them being imprisoned for a crime they did not commit. Action adventure based on the 1980s TV series, with Liam Neeson, Bradley Cooper, Sharlto Copley and Quinton 'Rampage' Jackson

programme.title: Secrets of the Factories
programme.desc: In factories across the nation, manufacturers are hard at work ensuring that Brits everywhere have all the trimmings they need for a comforting classic Christmas. This documentary takes a look at how staples of the festive season actually get made, such as Christmas trees, Christmas crackers, tinsel, Christmas jumpers and Christmas puddings. Plus, a look at some food items, such as the 10,000 tonnes of sprouts grown and harvested in Lincolnshire and how enough figgy puddings are made in a single week to fill the seats of Tottenham Hotspur Stadium

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Some of Britain's filthiest and most cluttered homes are tackled in the space of just three days

programme.title: Accused: Trial in the Outback
programme.desc: Conclusion of the documentary exploring the infamous 1980 trial of Lindy Chamberlain, who was falsely accused of murdering her nine-week-old baby during a family camping trip in Central Australia, after the child was attacked by a dingo. Featuring contributions from the Chamberlain family and their personal archives, the programme also features exclusive interviewees that encompass eyewitnesses, family friends, high court judges, forensic experts and lawyers, who share their thoughts on the story of a case that still resonates to this day

programme.title: Britain's Worst Crimes
programme.desc: The circumstances surrounding the murder of 23-year-old Rachel Nickell in July 1992, when she was attacked and killed in front of her two-year-old son Alex on Wimbledon Common. Colin Stagg was originally charged with the murder, but was eventually acquitted in September 1994 before the case went cold. With more advanced and refined forensic techniques available, Scotland Yard later reopened the investigation and in December 2008 Robert Napper - already serving time in prison for another killing - pleaded guilty to Nickell's manslaughter

programme.title: Martin Lewis: The Price of Fame

programme.title: Gregg Wallace's Magical Christmas Market
programme.desc: The MasterChef presenter embarks on a festive adventure around Europe to learn how the humble market stall has become such a key staple of Christmas, both in Britain and around the world. In Vienna he finds out about the Christmas market's origins and the ingredients that make them such special places, from mulled wine to hand-made decorations. He also reveals how the UK's Christmas traditions travelled from this part of Europe, with the help of Queen Victoria's husband Prince Albert

In the building by themselves, a fairy-tale snowscape outside and desires building inside they find that being alone together is all the Christmas magic they need. Romantic drama, starring Henderson Wade and Zarrin Darnell-Martin

programme.title: Write Before Christmas (2019)
programme.desc: A woman sends Christmas cards to people who have influenced her life - the aunt who raised her, her younger brother in the military, a pop star who provided the soundtrack to her life, the music teacher who inspired her, and her best friend, who always told the truth. The recipients are each inspired to act in their own lives to make them better. Drama, starring Torrey DeVitto

programme.title: 5 News Tonight
programme.desc: A round-up of the evening's headlines, including coverage of the latest national and international stories

programme.title: The Gadget Show
programme.desc: Craig Charles hosts The Gadget Show Awards 2020, an essential rundown of everything that's made it big this year in tech. Jon Bentley puts three home cinema set-ups through their paces, while Jordan Erica Webber and Harry Wallop enjoy a bout of gaming unboxing and reveal how to stream Christmas flicks for free

programme.title: Walking Britain's Lost Railways
programme.desc: Starting out from the Regency splendour of Cheltenham, Rob Bell crosses the Cotswolds, following the 46-mile route of the Banbury and Cheltenham Direct Railway. The line passes many quarries, all producing the famous Cotswold stone - some now abandoned and some still supplying stone to sites like Hampton Court. With numerous hills to negotiate, this railway was never an express route, but it did open up this landscape to visitors for the first time. From the late 1800s, tourists piled in by rail to explore picture postcard villages like Bourton-on-the-Water, establishing a new local 'industry'

programme.title: The World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: A trip through Devon to the tip of Cornwall, going back in time to recapture the golden age of luxury train travel. Travelling in the elegantly restored Statesman, passengers relax in its vintage carriages and enjoy the exquisite service. The first stop is on the stunning Devon coast, which suffered devastating destruction during the heavy winter storms of 2014. From Dawlish, it heads to Cornwall and across the Royal Albert Bridge, a masterpiece of railway engineering

programme.title: Live Boxing
programme.desc: Sam Eggington v Ashley Theophane. Coverage of the super-welterweight contest, which takes place at Fly By Nite Rehearsal Studios in Redditch. Veteran Theophane is fighting in the UK for the first time since 2012 here and is on an eight-fight winning streak, while Eggington is hoping to bounce back from his recent unanimous-decision loss to Ted Cheeseman at the Matchroom Fight Camp event in August that cost him the IBF International title

programme.title: Good Girls' Guide to Kinky Sex
programme.desc: The bedroom experiment continues as three self-confessed good girls and their guys look for creative ways to improve their sex lives. programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part one of two. Abby's homeland security think-tank is compromised when its leader is found to have been murdered, and a theoretical guide to how to pull off a terror attack is stolen

programme.title: Building Britain's Canals
programme.desc: Writer and historian Dan Jones navigates Britain's longest canal to be built by just one company, the Leeds and Liverpool Canal. Built to link the economically booming counties of Yorkshire and Lancashire, this 19th-century superhighway was experimental for the time, and made Liverpool the busiest port in the world. In Burnley, the cotton capital of the 19th century, Dan visits the world's only steam-powered cotton mill, where enough cloth was woven each year to reach to the moon and back two-and-a-half times

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Angel and the Badman (1947)
programme.desc: A gunslinger determined to track down his father's killer is badly wounded and taken in by a Quaker family, whose daughter nurses him back to health. His attraction to the girl and growing respect for the family's peaceful way of life lead him to consider renouncing violence - but his desire for revenge proves hard to surrender. Western, starring John Wayne, Bruce Cabot and Gail Russell

programme.title: The Guns of Fort Petticoat (1957)
programme.desc: A lieutenant deserts after his commanding officer launches an unprovoked attack on a Comanche village during the Civil War. Realising that there are no soldiers in his home town to protect it from reprisals, he returns to train the local women to defend themselves. Western, starring Audie Murphy, Kathryn Grant, Hope Emerson and Jeff Donnell

programme.title: Houseboat (1958)
programme.desc: An Italian socialite rebels against her domineering father and gets a job as a maid for a widowed father. While helping her employer learn to understand his three precocious children, she also falls in love with him and must decide whether or not to reveal her secret. Romantic comedy, starring Cary Grant and Sophia Loren

programme.title: Last Train from Gun Hill (1959)
programme.desc: A marshal discovers the man responsible for raping and killing his wife is actually the son of an old friend, setting the scene for a showdown. Western, starring Kirk Douglas, Anthony Quinn, Brian Hutton and Carolyn Jones

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows (2016)
programme.desc: The sewer-dwelling heroes discover their arch enemy Shredder has returned from another dimension, and made a deal with an alien warlord. Assisted by two mutant henchman, Shredder goes in search of a lost device that will allow his new ally to mount an invasion of Earth. Action adventure sequel, starring Megan Fox, Will Arnett and Stephen Amell

programme.title: Den of Thieves (2018)
programme.desc: An elite unit of the Los Angeles county sheriffs' department investigates a series of perfectly executed heists, and uncovers a criminal gang composed of military veterans, whose strategic and combat experience make them an elusive foe. The investigators set out to bring them to justice before they can carry out their biggest robbery yet - stealing £120million from the Federal Reserve Bank. Director Christian Gudegast's crime drama, starring Gerard Butler and Jordan Bridges

programme.title: Mike and Dave Need Wedding Dates (2016)
programme.desc: Two hard-partying brothers place an online advertisement to find the perfect dates for their sister's Hawaiian wedding. Hoping for a wild getaway, the boys instead find themselves out-hustled by an uncontrollable duo and calamity ensues. Comedy, starring Zac Efron, Anna Kendrick and Adam Devine

programme.title: The Principles of Lust (2003)
programme.desc: An aspiring artist is faced with a dilemma when he is forced to choose between a normal family life with his girlfriend and her son, or a hedonistic whirl of sex, drugs and rock 'n' roll with a risk-taking friend. Drama, starring Alec Newman, Marc Warren, Sienna Guillory and Lara Clifton

programme.title: The Greatest Show on Earth (1952)
programme.desc: A circus owner hires a celebrated trapeze artist to perform with his girlfriend as the star attraction - leading to bitter rivalry in the air and sexual tension on the ground. Meanwhile, a clown tries to keep his past a secret, and racketeers prepare to muscle in on the concessions. Cecil B DeMille's Oscar-winning drama, starring Charlton Heston, Cornel Wilde, Betty Hutton and James Stewart

programme.title: Waterloo Road (1944)
programme.desc: A soldier serving in the Second World War discovers his wife has betrayed him by having an affair with a petty crook, so he resolves to settle matters and deserts from the army. He returns to a Blitz-ravaged London to confront his rival, but his quest for retribution is interrupted by an air raid. Drama, starring John Mills, Joy Shelton, Alastair Sim and Stewart Granger

programme.title: 49th Parallel (1941)
programme.desc: Six Nazis are left stranded in Canada after their U-boat is sunk. As they try to escape the attentions of the authorities, they struggle to win sympathy among the locals. But when that fails, they decide to flee to the still-neutral USA instead. Michael Powell's Oscar-winning Second World War thriller, starring Anton Walbrook, Leslie Howard, Laurence Olivier, Glynis Johns and Niall MacGinnis

programme.title: Bridge of Spies (2015)
programme.desc: A lawyer in 1950s New York is hired to represent a Soviet spy in a showcase trial designed to demonstrate the fairness of the US justice system. In the face of public condemnation, he argues against the death penalty, a stance that years later leads to his involvement in an exchange of prisoners in East Germany. Steven Spielberg's fact-based Cold War drama, starring Tom Hanks and an Oscar-winning Mark Rylance

programme.title: Gifted (2017)
programme.desc: Single man Frank Adler attempts to raise his child prodigy niece, Mary. However, his plans for a normal school life for the youngster are foiled when the youngster's mathematical abilities come to the attention of Frank's formidable mother, Evelyn. Drama, starring Chris Evans, Lindsay Duncan and Mckenna Grace

programme.title: Planes, Trains and Automobiles (1987)
programme.desc: A stressed businessman just wants to make it home to spend Thanksgiving with his family. However, when his flight is forced to land miles from its destination, he finds himself sharing a disaster-strewn journey across America with an amiable but slobbish salesman. Comedy road movie, starring Steve Martin, John Candy, Laila Robins, Kevin Bacon and Michael McKean

programme.title: Sightseers (2012)
programme.desc: A woman leading a sheltered life joins her new boyfriend on a caravanning holiday. His love of obscure tourist spots conceals a fierce rage that leads him to murder anyone who spoils their excursions, but this dark side only excites his timid travelling companion, who begins a killing spree of her own. Comedy horror, starring Alice Lowe and Steve Oram

programme.title: Drunk Wedding (2015)
programme.desc: A couple's marriage at a resort in Nicaragua is ruined when their college friends get drunk on tequila and the ir big day descends into an orgy of excessive boozing, embarrassing revelations, sexual opportunism and general bad behaviour. Comedy, starring Christian Cooke, Nick P Ross and JR Ramirez

programme.title: The Sound of Fury (1950)
programme.desc: A criminal recruits a hard-up family man as his accomplice in a kidnapping. But when they murder the hostage, they find themselves at the mercy of revenge-seeking mob, whose anger is stoked by the press stories of a crusading reporter determined the pair will pay the ultimate price for their crime. Depression-era drama, starring Frank Lovejoy, Lloyd Bridges, Kathleen Ryan and Richard Carlson

programme.title: War of the Wildcats (1943)
programme.desc: An ambitious cowboy engages in a bitter personal feud with a powerful oil baron in a battle for the rights to drill on sacred native American land, and when both men fall for the same woman, the conflict between them gets even uglier. Western adventure, starring John Wayne, Albert Dekker, Martha Scott and Gabby Hayes

programme.title: The Violent Men (1955)
programme.desc: A ruthless cattle baron sets out to create his own private empire, no matter what the cost. When he resorts to murder, he makes an enemy of a civil war veteran, while his lust for power drives his wife into the arms of his younger brother. Western, starring Edward G Robinson, Barbara Stanwyck and Glenn Ford

programme.title: Fantastic Voyage (1966)
programme.desc: A medical team is miniaturised and injected into the bloodstream of a scientist to repair his severely damaged brain - unaware that one of the microscopic passengers has sabotage on his mind. Richard Fleischer's sci-fi adventure, starring Raquel Welch, Stephen Boyd, Donald Pleasence and Edmond O'Brien

programme.title: GI Joe: The Rise of Cobra (2009)
programme.desc: When a powerful experimental weapon is snatched by a mysterious terrorist organisation, two of the soldiers guarding it are recruited into a top-secret military strike force. As they go in search of the stolen technology, they uncover a plot by its creator to take over the world. Action adventure, with Channing Tatum, Sienna Miller and Christopher Eccleston

programme.title: Hell or High Water (2016)
programme.desc: Divorcee Toby Howard and his ex-con older brother Tanner embark on a meticulously-planned crime spree, hoping to rob every branch of the West Texas bank that has threatened to foreclose on their family ranch. However, they soon find themselves being pursued by two veteran Texas Rangers. Neo-western drama, starring Jeff Bridges, Chris Pine and Ben Foster

programme.title: Starred Up (2013)
programme.desc: An inmate in a young offender's institution is transferred to an adult prison when he proves too violent to control. He is reunited with his father, who has spent most of his life behind bars, and comes to realise that his survival in this brutal new environment hinges on learning to control his rage. Drama, starring Jack O'Connell and Rupert Friend

programme.title: The Family (2013)

programme.desc: The Charmed Ones must face their worst fears in order to reclaim the Power of Three. Fantasy drama about three young witches with supernatural powers, starring Melonie Diaz, Sarah Jeffery, Madeleine Mantock and Rupert Evans

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys find a laptop that has some virtual currency on it. The only snag is, the computer belongs to Penny's ex-boyfriend Zack. Meanwhile, a seven-year-old video reveals a secret about Leonard and Penny's relationship

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy try to eliminate stress from the planning of their wedding by applying mathematics to the process. Meanwhile, Raj 'breaks up' with Howard after realising that his best friend is actually damaging his confidence

programme.title: Hollyoaks Favourites
programme.desc: Looking back at a classic episode of the soap from 1998. When Mandy goes missing, her boyfriend Sol is questioned by the police. Elsewhere, Lucy is feeling pushed out of the family business when Kurt seems to be getting all the golden opportunities

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Greg Davies sets his celebrity contestants challenges involving snowglobes, rubber ducks and wooden spoons, inviting Liza Tarbuck, Alice Levine, Asim Chaudhry, Russell Howard and Tim Vine attempt to impress Greg with their creativity and ingenuity. Alex Horne provides crucial data analytics

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Now that he's officially back at the precinct and desperate to solve a real criminal case, Peralta finds a loophole to get out of his temporarily designated desk duty. Unfortunately, that loophole rests on his ability to pass an official evaluation performed by Captain Holt. While Boyle provides Peralta with moral support, Jeffords and Santiago help Diaz, who believes Pimento may be cheating on her

programme.title: World War Z (2013)
programme.desc: A virus sweeps across the globe, turning everyone infected into mindless, ravening zombies. As entire countries fall into chaos, a United Nations investigator sets off on a journey around the world to discover the cause of the pandemic and hopefully find a cure before human civilisation is brought to an end. Thriller based on the novel by Max Brooks, starring Brad Pitt and Mireille Enos

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys become stranded in the middle of nowhere when Leonard's car is stolen en route to the Bakersfield comic-book convention. Meanwhile, back at home, the women try to work out why the guys are so fascinated with such publications

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is furious when the university forces him to work with Kripke, while Howard's hobby lands him in financial trouble. However, that doesn't stop him and Raj getting expensive action figures of themselves made - much to Bernadette's disapproval

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Two more singletons choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who will be revealed to them one body part at a time. First up is 24-year-old Rebecca, a singer from Nottinghamshire who is tired of always having her heart broken by guys with a bad boy image and wants to see if choosing a date in the studio can help her pick a better mate. Next up is 25-year-old development manager Dan from Durham, who has unsuccessfully tried countless dating apps and hopes to find Mr Right

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The nation's favourite armchair critics share their opinions on shows airing in April 2016, including Guy Martin's Wall of Death: Live, Bake Off Creme de la Creme, EastEnders, Bear Grylls: Mission Survive, Antiques Roadshow, This Farming Life, The Night Manager and the news. The programme captures their instant reactions and lively - sometimes emotional - discussions from the comfort of their own homes

programme.title: Angel
programme.desc: The prophecy that Angel will kill Connor seems to be coming true as the vampire experiences sudden mood swings and cravings for blood. Wesley tries to stop it by kidnapping the child, but Holtz seizes the opportunity to get his revenge by taking Connor for himself

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Adam and Jonny are horrified to find their parents in a hot tub in the garden, drinking champagne. Neighbour Jim arrives to ask them if they can look after Wilson because his sister, who's terrified of dogs, is coming to visit. When the boys are sent out to get a takeaway, they spot Jim in the restaurant alongside a woman sporting the world's most annoying laugh. When Jim and his date turn up - soaking wet - at the house, the family has to endure a hellish dinner with them. Comedy, starring Simon Bird, Tom Rosenthal, Tamsin Greig and Paul Ritter

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: When Mum's best friend, Val moves in after rowing with her husband, Dad soon finds himself driven to distraction after the visitor repeatedly tidies up the house and chucks away all his old stuff. Tensions reach boiling-point when Val finds an aged tin of meat with a 'best before 1996' date that Dad has been storing in his shed. Tracy-Ann Oberman plays the unwelcome visitor in writer Robert Popper's award-winning comedy, alongside series regulars Simon Bird, Tom Rosenthal, Tamsin Greig and Paul Ritter

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny talks himself into an unlikely business partnership with Bob. David gets an interview at a women's clothing shop, while Moira reluctantly cares for an ailing Alexis. Sitcom, starring Eugene Levy

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny celebrate Valentine's Day, but their evening takes a turn for the worse when the latter's ex-boyfriend proposes to his girlfriend in the same restaurant. Meanwhile, Sheldon enlists the help of his assistant Alex to find the perfect gift for Amy

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj is upset after Lucy runs away in the middle of their date, leaving the gang to cheer him up. However, when Howard bumps into her, she admits she is incredibly shy. Meanwhile, Sheldon asks Penny to help with a new episode of Fun with Flags, and because he is impressed by her acting ability, the friends go to see her in a performance of A Streetcar Named Desire

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Marshall and Lily become concerned that Ted's new girlfriend is a deranged stalker, but he insists they are destined to be together. Meanwhile, Barney heads to Canada to track down a mystery man with whom Robin was dangerously obsessed as a teenager. Sitcom, guest starring Jason Priestley

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted's friends tell him to break up with his girlfriend Jeanette, because they find her behaviour stressful. However, it is only when she gains access to his flat and barricades herself in his bedroom that he considers their advice. Meanwhile, Robin is frightened to hold baby Marvin in case she drops him. Guest starring boxer Mike Tyson

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp visits the Devon County Show, where she discovers the secret of home-made handscrub and learns about beekeeping and making beeswax candles. She also tries her hand at crafting jewellery in silver clay - an ideal way of making unusual but inexpensive gifts

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Elaine and Patrick Scott from Lancashire are both history buffs with a passion for the 1940s, and want to move permanently to Normandy in France. Drawn by rich culture and history, they're after a home in the Manche area. Laura Hamilton shows them five properties for their £140,000 budget

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit Wales, where Henry restores a Royal Enfield motorbike, converting it into a classic cafe racer. Simon's choice of an old school house radiator springs a leak, but he gets an 1980s pinball machine back to its best

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien travel across the UK to find unique and valuable items languishing in people's homes and use creative thinking and elbow grease to fix them up to turn a profit for their owners. Here they unearth a church pew, create a fish tank from scrap and uncover a special petrol tank

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Anna and Edward host another big wedding, but Edward is put out of action and with the food delayed and the weather threatening to take a turn for the worse, Anna has to work hard to pull it off without a hitch. Dick visits Tim and Rebecca as they run into structural problems on their second B&B guest suite. With only one guest room up and running, they're in a race against time to double their income by the end of the summer season. Paul tackles a leaking outbuilding to finish the cinema room, while Karen does all she can to bag their first wedding booking

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: A couple in Essex with five daughters plan to build a contemporary home in a woodland clearing, but the budgets and schedules soon get out of control

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: David Lewis and Giles Beaton kick off the competition at Langland Road in Swansea, where they hope to impress their guests with an ultra-modern approach. Unfortunately, not all the guests can figure out what the hi-tech offerings are. To make matters worse, traditionalists Gordon and Sandra McCallum are more concerned by cobwebs and dust

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Ruth and Margaret Dugdall welcome their rivals to Castle Lodge Hotel in Felixstowe, Suffolk. Ed Prophet plays a series of tricks on Gordon McCallum in the hope of making him smile, but previous hosts David Lewis and Giles Beaton are unimpressed when the prankster takes on the role of waiter

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Gordon and Sandra McCallum host at Bryn Woodlands House in Colwyn Bay, Conwy, where they take the group harness racing. Ed Prophet worries about getting manure on his face, and later receives a shock. Margaret and Ruth Dugdall think the B&B's decor is poor, and Giles Beaton has a problem with a bottle of ketchup

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Edward Prophet and fiancee Rachel Pickup play host at the Tollemache Arms in Cheshire as the week's competition enters the final round. The couple pull out all the stops to charm their guests, but their efforts are undermined by a shambolic breakfast service

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: As the contestants prepare to discover which of their establishments has won the competition, the owners of Langland Road are shocked by a peculiar payment, and begin to suspect something is amiss. The Castle Lodge hoteliers are dismayed when criticism is directed towards their new wallpaper, and the proprietors of Bryn Woodland House struggle to face up to their shortcomings

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Dagmar the giraffe is supporting her closest herd member Orla, whose new calf is overdue - but at the same time she is reluctant to allow her own youngest to feed properly. So the keepers plan a herd birth in the hope that both mothers can learn from each other. There is concern when two of the spider monkeys withdraw from their family, while two devoted camels experience the trauma of separation when one undergoes an operation

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge demonstrates how he maintains his land on his trusty tractor. Couple Emma and Paul have bought a chateau in northern France. Carpenter Paul crafts a safety fence for their elevated swimming pool, Emma tackles their maze, and their first paying guests arrive. Cameras also capture Clive and his family, including 20-year-old daughter Abbie, who manages their 36-bedroom chateau in the Dordogne Valley. Getting their chateau ready for the wedding season, the family tackle the leaky roof and refresh the bedrooms, but the furniture proves tricky to fit.And three sisters raised in the UK travel to France in search of the perfect chateau, but they have a very long checklist

programme.title: Grand Designs New Zealand
programme.desc: Chris Moller visits Nelson on the South Island, where a retired architect and triathlete plans to build an affordable, energy-efficient home future-proofed against climate change

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Design engineer Joe Stuart and service designer Lina Nilsson take on the London property market, as they build their own home on a small 38-square-metre plot. Joe designs a split-level house that will cleverly maximise the space, but the project soon runs months behind schedule, and thousands of pounds over their £160,000 budget

programme.title: Little British Isles with Alison Steadman
programme.desc: Alison Steadman's trip around some of the many smaller islands that surround mainland Britain concludes with a visit to the Isles of Scilly. Her attention falls on Tresco, Bryher, St Martins and St Agnes, collectively known as the Off Islands, where she discovers a Robinson Crusoe-style desert island, and one of the finest examples of a sub-tropical garden in the northern hemisphere. She also gets some hands-on experience at one of the world's smallest working dairy farms, and reveals how the tourist-friendly locals have found inventive ways to maintain their slice of island life

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Glyn, 53, is brought in by ambulance after a work-related accident on a building site, and in his hour of need he turns to his lifelong friend Barrie. Eighteen-month-old Zemirah's parents are concerned with her diarrhoea and vomiting and 93-year-old John is admitted after falling at home, but also has a severe case of sepsis

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show's version of the words-and-numbers quiz, with Jon Richardson and Cariad Lloyd taking on guest captain Alan Carr and Kevin Bridges. Elis James and John Robins join Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to Italian family restaurant Sabatiello's in Stamford, Connecticut, where the owner's fiery temper upsets the staff and has left him more than $1million in debt. Gordon's help is urgently needed to get customers back through the door, but the restaurateur does not take kindly to criticism and closes the restaurant down when his employees turn on him

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Glyn, 53, is brought in by ambulance after a work-related accident on a building site, and in his hour of need he turns to his lifelong friend Barrie. Eighteen-month-old Zemirah's parents are concerned with her diarrhoea and vomiting and 93-year-old John is admitted after falling at home, but also has a severe case of sepsis

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Collie cross puppy Joey is a popular dog around the kennels, and has been a reliable buddy for the anxious dogs - but will he prove the same support to Holly, Adam and their son Oscar? Toy poodle Gizmo tries to overcome his social anxieties to win the hearts of Fiona and Maisie, a mother and daughter coming to terms with their future separation, and a lurcher with a broken tail requires lots of care - and with any luck, a forever home

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: A selection of favourite investigations, including Jimmy Doherty visiting Spain to find out how much orange goes into squash. Matt Tebbutt tries to solve the age-old mystery of how to get ketchup out of the bottle smoothly, while Kate Quilton checks Marmite's TV advert claims that a DNA test can predict whether people are more likely to love it or hate it

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Rosemarie Clarke and Jeff John from London are looking for the perfect holiday home on the Caribbean island of St Lucia. Rosemarie was born in Jamaica, while Jeff's family are from St Lucia. Danni Menzies shows them five properties for their budget of £175,000

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien are in East Sussex and Hertfordshire, with finds that include a Victorian egg incubator

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien travel to the West Midlands and London, where finds include a potato oven and an old petrol pump

programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge demonstrates how he maintains his land on his trusty tractor. Couple Emma and Paul have bought a chateau in northern France. Getting their chateau ready for the wedding season, the family tackle the leaky roof and refresh the bedrooms, but the furniture proves tricky to fit.And three sisters raised in the UK travel to France in search of the perfect chateau, but they have a very long checklist

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton meets a Cambridgeshire couple with plans to build a four-bedroom cottage, whose budget has turned out to be less accommodating than originally planned for

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Owner Alfie Bubbles and former Brookside star Philip Olivier welcome guests to a Beatles-themed hotel - The Yellow Submarine - in Liverpool. However, one guest is unimpressed when she falls ill on a sea voyage, and breakfast turns into a comedy of errors

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Megan Edgcumbe and Dick Stanley host the latest round of the competition at Manor Lodge in Cornwall. Things get off to a good start when the guests find their rooms clean, but later the hostess reveals her upper-class background and a Cumberland sausage causes a stir at breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: James and Judith Calderbank invite their fellow competitors to the rural Ashculme House in Devon for the third visit of the week, but the couple's back-to-basics approach does not go down well with all the guests. Workaholic Alfie worries that having no phone signal will affect his business, while competitive Megan and Dick relish finding dust in the outside building

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competitors have great expectations of Kevin Wainwright and partner David Little's Satis House in Suffolk, but the last visit of the week sees old resentments resurface as Megan and Dick eagerly point out faults in the hosts' presentation - including an oversight in their room and overly crispy bacon for breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances. Alfie and rival owner Megan engage in a debate about breakfasts and heating, while David and Kevin become a little emotional before the week's winner is announced

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Keepers introduce a new male to the spotty chocolate poison dart frog colony, hoping that the competition will result in an increase in tadpoles. Meanwhile, the Sulawesi macaques are ecstatic to welcome a new baby to their family, but their enthusiasm is a cause for concern as new mother Maggie may not be able to protect her baby from the other females

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick helps Paul cut some Vitrolite vintage tiles for an art deco bathroom - but it proves harder than they expected. Some lime plastering back at Paul's chateau requires a search for some horse hair from a local stables. Abbie is busy painting furniture for bedrooms, and mum Karen has problems with their swimming pool, the fire extinguishers certifications all need renewing, and with a big wedding party arriving soon, the to-do list just keeps getting longer

programme.title: Grand Designs New Zealand
programme.desc: Chris Moller meets ambitious and innovative people who are creating their dream homes. Brendan and Nikki have always wanted to live in vibrant inner Auckland, but prices have risen well above their reach, so they've come up with a plan to build a penthouse apartment with a Balinese-inspired rooftop garden as part of a groundbreaking mixed-use development

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Following the work of Ed and Rowena Waghorn as they continue to build a handcrafted, five-bedroom house on an eight acre smallholding in Herefordshire, 10 years in the making. Progress on the build was slow as Ed decided to do most of the work himself, and after four years the house was still a shell. In 2012 Kevin McCloud decided to follow the build for another five years. In the end, it's just possible this house might have turned out to be a masterpiece

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George is in Wirral to help retired couple Charles and Ian, who are finally getting round to a complete redesign of their Edwardian home. But will they agree to his radical changes or are they too set in their ways? George also tackles an 1850s country house in Surrey which has accrued some bizarre additions over the years, including a 1970s MDF staircase, a baronial fireplace and a random room that contains nothing but the fuse box

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton follows single mum Fiona Oliver as she pioneers a brand-new, beehive-inspired kit home on a seriously steep plot in the Tamar Valley, Cornwall

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Danny, who's 41, is brought into hospital after falling 20 feet through a skylight onto concrete. Meanwhile, 27-year-old Tara receives treatment for her severe abdominal pains, and three-year-old Clara is brought to A&E by her mum, with a chickpea stuck up her nose

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show's version of the words-and-numbers quiz, with guest captain Kathy Burke and Roisin Conaty taking on guest captain Johnny Vegas and Bob Mortimer. John Cooper Clarke joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect meets a father and son building an ambitious clifftop retreat and a young architect embarking on his first commission - a garden pavilion for his grandmother. Master craftsman Will Hardie sets out to transform the humble beach hut into the most unlikely of holiday getaways, and in Germany, George visits a modern house in a medieval town

programme.title: The Supervet: Bionic Specials
programme.desc: The documentary about a pioneering veterinary practice delves deeper into the science behind the cutting-edge procedures used by Professor Noel Fitzpatrick and his staff. When a dog is brought in with a potentially large tumour in its head, Noel tries something he has never done before, using state-of-the-art technology to design a custom-made implant to replace the part of the skull affected by the cancer. He also tries to cure a terrier's limp by performing an elbow replacement - using a 3D-printed hinged joint

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty heads to Paris to find out why baguettes go stale so much faster than sliced loaves of bread. Matt Tebbutt is in Italy to investigate why buffalo mozzarella is much more expensive than that from cows and Briony May Williams discovers the surprising secret to the making of mushy peas
